channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Court Upholds Nullification of APC Congresses That Produced Tony Okocha’s Exco in Rivers
item.description: The Court of Appeal sitting for Port Harcourt on Friday uphold the decision wey Rivers State High Court don give before, wey nullify the All Progressives Congress (APC) congresses wey produce Chief To...

item.title: Global events and key developments captured in photos from May 23 to 29, 2026
item.description: This photo essay provides a visual recap of major global and Philippine events from May 23 to 29, 2026, covering political developments, humanitarian crises, sports, and cultural moments. In the Phili...

item.title: Family and Indigenous Leaders Raise Concerns Over Missed Warning Signs in Maternal Death
item.description: A recent investigation has highlighted the tragic death of a pregnant Indigenous woman, which family members and community advocates believe could have been prevented. According to reports, multiple w...

item.title: Tingog representative questions timing of Senate flood control probe resumption
item.description: Tingog party-list representative Jude Acidre criticized the timing of the Senate's plan to resume its investigation into alleged flood control anomalies. Speaking at a Quezon City news forum, Acidre e...

item.title: Key Players to Watch as Arsenal and PSG Clash in Champions League Final
item.description: Arsenal and Paris Saint-Germain are set to face each other in the UEFA Champions League final at the Puskás Arena, with both sides chasing major European glory. Arsenal are entering their second-ever ...

item.title: Port Harcourt Set To Host 2026 NWFL Super Six Women Football Tournament
item.description: The Nigeria Women Football League don announce say Port Harcourt go be the host city for the 2026 Premiership Super Six tournament, e go be the first time Rivers State dey host the season-ending compe...

item.title: Aisha Yesufu raises concerns over conduct of NDC FCT senatorial primary
item.description: Human rights activist and former Federal Capital Territory (FCT) senatorial aspirant under the National Democratic Coalition (NDC), Aisha Yesufu, has raised serious concerns about how the party’s prim...

item.title: Families Mourn Utumishi Girls Academy Students Following Dormitory Fire
item.description: The nation continues to mourn the tragic fire at Utumishi Girls Academy, which claimed the lives of 16 students and injured 79 others. Among the grieving parents is Bishop Joseph Matura from Ewuaso Ke...

item.title: Lightning-caused wildfire grows rapidly near Prince Albert, Saskatchewan, prompting evacuation alert
item.description: A fast-moving wildfire in central Saskatchewan, known as the Lobstick fire, has expanded significantly after being ignited by a lightning strike earlier in the week. Initially thought to have been cau...

item.title: New Emurua Dikirr MP David Keter introduces wife publicly after by-election victory
item.description: Newly elected Emurua Dikirr Member of Parliament David Keter, popularly known as Dollarline, has drawn public attention after officially introducing his wife, Bot Neno, to constituents following his r...

item.title: Prolonged forest fires in Rajouri damage ecosystems and push wildlife into nearby villages
item.description: Forest fires have been raging for several days across multiple locations in the Rajouri Forest Division of Jammu and Kashmir, largely driven by prolonged hot and dry weather conditions. The situation ...

item.title: Iranian civilians face economic hardship and political repression following US-Israel conflict and domestic unrest
item.description: The article examines the deteriorating situation in Iran following a period of conflict involving the United States and Israel, alongside ongoing domestic unrest. Many Iranians report being left to co...

item.title: Fire destroys three homes north of Brisbane, prompting lockdown measures
item.description: A large residential fire north of Brisbane has destroyed three houses and led authorities to impose lockdowns on several nearby streets. Emergency services were rapid to the scene, containing the blaz...

item.title: Danniella Westbrook prepares for further reconstructive facial surgery following previous procedures
item.description: Danniella Westbrook has shared an updated photograph of herself as she prepares for another round of corrective facial surgery, focusing on her upper lip and internal mouth and nose reconstruction. Th...

item.title: TikToker Peter Kioi Shares His Burial Wishes After Leaving Rehab Centre
item.description: TikToker Peter Kioi has left many Kenyans worried after he recently left a rehabilitation facility and went live on TikTok to discuss plans for his own funeral. The content creator, who was sponsored ...

item.title: Calabarzon rallies past Davao to win 2026 Palarong Pambansa secondary boys' basketball championship
item.description: Calabarzon successfully reclaimed the secondary boys’ basketball crown in the 2026 Palarong Pambansa after defeating defending champions Davao Region, 79-62, in a comeback victory held in Agusan del S...

item.title: Letters to the Editor Discuss Alberta, Indigenous Consultation, and Broader Canadian Issues
item.description: The Globe and Mail's letters to the editor on May 30 highlight several pressing Canadian issues, with a particular focus on Alberta's constitutional duty to consult Indigenous groups. Jim Reynolds str...
